PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Bryan, via CourtCall, counsel for Leo Ulfelder, IV, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking if there are any objections to this petition. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 7, 2013, is admitted to probate. Leo Ulfelder IV, is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 7, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed at least two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
